title: Job Launch: Resume Polish, LinkedIn Posts, and Apply Strategy
content:
### Day 240: Job Launch: Resume Polish, LinkedIn Posts, and Apply Strategy

**Job Launch Checklist:**
1. ✅ Resume: 1-page, quantified achievements, ATS-friendly
2. ✅ GitHub: 3 pinned projects with clean READMEs
3. ✅ LinkedIn: Updated headline, summary, project posts
4. ✅ Apply: 5-10 targeted applications per day
5. ✅ Network: Connect with recruiters, attend meetups
codeExample:
# Day 240: Job Launch: Resume Polish, LinkedIn Posts, and Apply Strategy
# Job Launch Strategy
strategy = {
    "Week 1-2": [
        "Polish resume with XYZ bullets",
        "Update LinkedIn with project posts",
        "Clean GitHub profile, pin 3 projects"
    ],
    "Week 3-4": [
        "Apply 5-10 jobs daily on LinkedIn/Naukri",
        "Customize cover letter per company",
        "Practice 2 coding problems daily"
    ],
    "Week 5-6": [
        "Mock interviews with friends",
        "Review ML theory flashcards",
        "Follow up on applications"
    ],
    "Ongoing": [
        "Write 1 technical blog post per week",
        "Network on LinkedIn (comments > posts)",
        "Keep building side projects"
    ]
}

print("🚀 Job Launch Strategy:")
for phase, tasks in strategy.items():
    print(f"\n{phase}:")
    for task in tasks:
        print(f"  • {task}")
practiceQuestions: How to write an ATS-friendly resume?
keyTakeaways:
✅ GitHub: 3 pinned projects with clean READMEs
3.

✅ LinkedIn: Updated headline, summary, project posts
4.
